payload.label: microwave
payload.long_description: Front face of a black microwave with stainless-steel trim and a reflective glass door showing bright specular reflections; a horizontal handle is visible on the right and the appliance is partially cropped at the right/top edges, appearing close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m).

message.content: {"label":"microwave","short_description":"black stainless steel microwave door","long_description":"Front face of a black microwave with stainless-steel trim and a reflective glass door showing bright specular reflections; a horizontal handle is visible on the right and the appliance is partially cropped at the right/top edges, appearing close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m).","attributes":["black finish","stainless-steel trim","reflective glass","horizontal handle on right","rectangular front","partial/cropped (right/top)","specular highlights/reflections"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
